message:
fix(web): add missing CocktailCompatibilityOverlay to OverlayManager

The CocktailCompatibilityOverlay component existed but was not wired up
in OverlayManager.tsx, making it inaccessible to users. Added lazy loading
import and component rendering in the Host interactions section.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
